rounds.prompt: How many times taller is Mount Everest than the Eiffel Tower?
rounds.fact: The Eiffel Tower is 330 m; Everest is 8,849 m — nearly 27× taller. Everest gains ~6 mm per year as the Indian plate pushes north.

rounds.prompt: How many times deeper is the Mariana Trench than the average ocean depth?
rounds.fact: Average ocean depth is ~3,440 m; the Mariana Trench's Challenger Deep is 11,034 m — 3.2× deeper than average.

rounds.prompt: How many times taller is Olympus Mons (Mars) than Mount Everest?
rounds.fact: Everest is 8,849 m; Olympus Mons on Mars is 21,900 m — nearly 3× taller. It's the largest volcano in the Solar System.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer is the Mid-Ocean Ridge than the Great Wall of China?
rounds.fact: The Great Wall is ~21,196 km; the Mid-Ocean Ridge is ~65,000 km — 3× longer. It's the longest mountain range on Earth, entirely underwater.

rounds.prompt: How many times higher does a cruising airplane fly than Mount Everest's summit?
rounds.fact: Everest peaks at 8,849 m; planes cruise at ~10,700 m — just 1.2× higher, but in a pressurised cabin with snacks.
